brand.name: Economic Times
brand.tagline: The Economic Times — India's No. 1 Business News Brand
brand.core_value_prop: ET goes beyond news — it provides tools, subscriptions, education, events, and partner services to help Indians make smarter financial and business decisions.

products.name: ET Prime (Gold)
products.tagline: India's most trusted business intelligence subscription
features: 4,000+ in-depth stock research reports
Big Bull Portfolio — tracks positions of top investors like Rakesh Jhunjhunwala legacy portfolios
Stock Analyzer — fundamental + technical scoring
95% ad-free reading experience
Exclusive long-form journalism and investigative pieces
Sector deep-dives and thematic research
Access to ET GrandMasters video library (120+ lessons)
Priority access to ET events and summits
Offline article reading via app
Personalized news feed and alert system
benefits: Make informed investment decisions backed by research
Save time — curated intelligence instead of scattered news
Track India's most successful investor portfolios
not_for: Casual news readers who don't invest
Users who only want real-time trading signals

faq.q: What is ET Prime?
faq.a: ET Prime is ET's paid subscription that gives you ad-free access, deep stock research, Big Bull Portfolio tracking, and exclusive business journalism.

faq.q: Can I try before I pay?
faq.a: Yes, ET Prime offers a 7-day free trial for new users.

faq.q: Is ET Prime different from ET Markets?
faq.a: Yes. ET Prime is for reading, research, and long-term investors. ET Markets app is for active traders and real-time market tracking.

faq.q: What is Big Bull Portfolio?
faq.a: It tracks publicly disclosed positions of India's top legendary investors so you can see where they are investing.

products.name: ET Prime (Platinum)
features: Everything in Gold
Unlimited access to ET GrandMasters masterclasses
1-on-1 expert consultation sessions (limited slots)
Early access to ET events with priority seating
Exclusive Platinum community and networking group
Monthly curated investment strategy report by editors

products.name: ET Markets App
features: Live NSE and BSE quotes and order book depth
AI-driven chart pattern recognition (head & shoulders, cup & handle, etc.)
Technical screeners — filter stocks by RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.
Upside Radar — proprietary algorithm spotting potential breakout stocks
F&O (Futures & Options) tracker with open interest analysis
Mutual fund performance comparison
IPO tracker with subscription status and GMP (grey market premium)
Global market indices — Dow, NASDAQ, Nifty 50, SGX Nifty
Currency rates — USD/INR, EUR/INR in real time
Commodity prices — Gold, Silver, Crude Oil
Portfolio P&L tracker with XIRR calculation
Custom watchlists with price alerts
Broker integration for seamless trading (select brokers)
Voice search for stock quotes
benefits: Everything a trader needs in one app
AI takes the guesswork out of chart reading
Set-and-forget price alerts so you never miss a move

faq.q: Is ET Markets app free?
faq.a: The core app is free. Advanced screeners and AI features may require ET Prime subscription.

faq.q: Can I buy stocks directly from ET Markets?
faq.a: ET Markets integrates with select brokers. You can place orders via the linked broker account.

faq.q: What is Upside Radar?
faq.a: Upside Radar is ET's proprietary algorithm that scans all listed stocks and flags those with high short-term upside potential based on technicals and volume patterns.

products.name: ET Money Earn
features: Fixed income investment products including bonds, NCDs, and fixed deposits
Target returns up to 9% per annum
Short, medium, and long tenure options
Curated credit-rated instruments only
SEBI-regulated investment platform
Mobile-first onboarding — KYC in minutes
Auto-renewal and SIP options for fixed income
Dashboard showing accrued interest in real time
benefits: Better returns than a savings account without equity risk
Ideal for emergency funds and short-term goals
Low volatility — not linked to stock market swings

faq.q: Is ET Money safe?
faq.a: ET Money is SEBI-registered and features only credit-rated instruments. However, all investments carry risk and are not bank-guaranteed.

faq.q: What is the minimum amount to invest?
faq.a: You can start with as little as ₹10,000.

faq.q: How is this different from a fixed deposit?
faq.a: ET Money Earn offers a curated marketplace with potentially higher yields than traditional FDs, along with flexibility in tenure.

products.name: ET GrandMasters
features: 120+ curated video lessons from 20+ top business leaders
New masterclasses added monthly
Covers: leadership, entrepreneurship, investing, marketing, HR, AI, negotiation
Downloadable study notes and summary PDFs
Certificate of completion for each module
Live Q&A sessions with instructors (select courses)

faq.q: What is ET GrandMasters?
faq.a: ET GrandMasters is a video learning platform with 120+ lessons taught by India's top CEOs, founders, and industry experts. It covers business, investing, leadership, and more.

faq.q: Is it free for students?
faq.a: Yes, students can access ET GrandMasters free with a valid college ID.

events.name: Maharashtra Business Summit 2026
benefits: Direct access to Maharashtra's business ecosystem
Networking with top investors and government officials

faq.q: Who should attend the Maharashtra Business Summit?
faq.a: Founders, industrialists, investors, and policy makers interested in doing business in Maharashtra — especially in infrastructure, green energy, and fintech.

faq.q: Do I need a technical background for the AI Summer Camp?
faq.a: No. The camp is designed for all students regardless of coding background.

masterclasses.name: Strategic Leadership for Exponential Business Growth
masterclasses.instructor_bio: Global advisor to Fortune 500 CEOs; author of 25+ bestselling books on business execution

faq.q: Who is Dr. Ram Charan?
faq.a: Dr. Ram Charan is one of the world's most sought-after business advisors, known for advising CEOs of GE, Bank of America, and Novartis. He's authored books like 'Execution' and 'The Attacker's Advantage'.

faq.q: Is accommodation included?
faq.a: Yes, the residential masterclass in Goa includes accommodation and meals for all 3 days.

masterclasses.name: Applications of Generative AI in HR
focus: AI tools for recruiting and screening

faq.q: Do I need to know AI to attend this masterclass?
faq.a: No prior AI knowledge is needed. Prof. Iyer starts from basics and moves to applied use cases specifically for HR functions.

masterclasses.name: AI for Business Leaders
focus: Building AI strategy for your business
AI in supply chain, marketing, finance

faq.q: Is this a live course?
faq.a: This is a fully self-paced recorded course. You get lifetime access and can learn at your own pace.

masterclasses.name: Business Negotiation Strategies for Success
focus: Negotiation in M&A and vendor contracts

faq.q: What industries is this negotiation workshop relevant for?
faq.a: The workshop is relevant across industries — sales, procurement, M&A, startups, and corporate leadership.

faq.q: How is this different from a digital marketing course?
faq.a: This is specifically focused on using AI to scale and optimize marketing — not a basics-of-digital-marketing course. It assumes you're already in a marketing leadership role.

partner_services.name: Axis Bank Premium Credit Card
perks: Complimentary domestic airport lounge access (8 visits/year)
International lounge access via Priority Pass (2 visits/year)
ET Prime subscription at discounted rate (₹499 off annual plan)
2X reward points on ET platform purchases
Fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations
Zero forex markup on international transactions
Complimentary travel insurance up to ₹50 lakhs

faq.q: How do I apply for the Axis Bank ET card?
faq.a: You can apply directly from the ET website or Axis Bank branch. Eligibility requires a minimum annual income of ₹6 LPA and a credit score of 720 or above.

faq.q: Do I get ET Prime free with the Axis card?
faq.a: You get a discounted ET Prime subscription — ₹499 off the annual plan — not a free subscription.

partner_services.name: ET Partner Insurance Marketplace
partner_services.description: ET partners with leading insurers to offer curated health, term life, and motor insurance products with ET Prime discounts.

faq.q: Does ET sell insurance?
faq.a: ET acts as an aggregator/partner marketplace. You compare and purchase insurance from partner insurers through the ET platform.

partner_services.name: ET Partner Loan Marketplace
partner_services.description: Personal loans, home loans, and business loans from partner NBFCs and banks, accessible via ET Money.

faq.q: Can I get a loan through ET?
faq.a: Yes, through ET Money's partner marketplace you can compare and apply for personal, home, and business loans from partner lenders.

intent_routing.user_intent: I want to invest safely with good returns
intent_routing.follow_up_question: How much are you looking to invest and for how long?

intent_routing.user_intent: I want to track the stock market live
intent_routing.follow_up_question: Are you a day trader or long-term investor?

intent_routing.user_intent: I want deep research on stocks before investing
intent_routing.follow_up_question: Are you interested in small-caps, large-caps, or specific sectors?

intent_routing.user_intent: I want to learn business skills or leadership
intent_routing.follow_up_question: Are you looking for live workshops or self-paced courses?

intent_routing.user_intent: I want to attend a business networking event
I'm an HR professional looking to use AI
I travel frequently and want credit card benefits
intent_routing.follow_up_question: Do you currently have an ET Prime subscription?

intent_routing.user_intent: I'm a student and want to learn AI
I'm a CEO wanting to scale my business
intent_routing.follow_up_question: What stage is your business at?

intent_routing.user_intent: What does ET offer besides news?
intent_routing.response_summary: ET offers subscriptions for research, trading tools, fixed-income investments, masterclasses, live events, and partner financial services like credit cards and insurance.

disambiguation_pairs.clarification: ET Prime is a subscription for research and long-form intelligence. ET Markets is the trading and live market data app. They are different products.
ET Money Earn is for fixed-income investing with stable returns. ET Markets is for tracking stocks and trading.
ET GrandMasters is the subscription video library. Masterclasses are individual paid live or recorded programs on specific topics.
